scope: Adds comprehensive test coverage for MongoDBAtlasFilterExpressionConverter with 25+ test methods covering missing operators, edge cases, and complex expressions
api_impact: None - purely test additions with no changes to public APIs or implementation code

No new dependencies, configuration changes, or public API modifications
reasoning: This PR only adds test methods to an existing test class without modifying any production code, public APIs, or configuration. Test additions that don't require API changes are explicitly approved for backporting according to the criteria.
recommendations: Safe for backporting. Consider running the full test suite to ensure the new tests pass in the 1.0.x environment and don't reveal any behavioral differences in the MongoDB Atlas filter converter between versions.
